title: Productize Operate
use_when: Use Productize Operate after a production deploy when the product needs a continuous operating cadence for health signals, feedback, support themes, incidents, fixes, release gates, docs, and learning-loop decisions.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Productize Operate for a raw idea or new capability that has not shipped; route that to 0-1. Do not use it for a stable acquisition or retention push with a clear growth target; route that to Productize Grow.
output_artifact: Production operating report with health signals, triage decision, required gates, and next learning cadence
framework_fit: Productize Operate fits the always-on production loop after shipping, where the product team must interpret live evidence, triage issues, decide whether to fix or escalate, and keep release, docs, QA, and comms gates current.
failure_modes: Treats production operation as a one-time launch readout instead of an ongoing cadence with thresholds, owners, triage rules, and repeat review dates.
Routes every live-product signal back to 0-1 even when the right action is monitoring, support triage, rollback, documentation, or a small production fix.
Skips gate calls after production evidence changes, leaving QA, release, docs, or comms stale against the actual product behavior customers are seeing.

examples.prompt: Use $operate for this production deploy: review health signals, support themes, incidents, metric movement, and decide which gates need to fire this week.
examples.expected_artifact: Production operating report with health signals, triage decision, required gates, and next learning cadence
